title: Environmental DNA (eDNA) extraction with modified Qiagen DNeasy Blood & Tissue kit
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"9a94h","text":"Nucleic acids extraction from the filters using the Qiagen DNeasy Blood and Tissue Kit with some modifications to the manufacturer’s protocol. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"dh3gd","text":"Workspace and equipment were cleaned prior: ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"4rr6s","text":"Workspace was wiped down with 10% bleach, followed by 70% ethanol.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"ceuff","text":"Pipettes and centrifuges were sprayed and wiped down with RNase Away.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"9b4og","text":"Pipettes, molecular grade water, and racks were UV sterilized for 20 min (10 min each side).","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}

These are available online in convenient and compact PDF format at www.qiagen.com/ts/msds.asp where you can find, view, and print the MSDS for each QIAGEN kit and kit component.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"7bgki","text":"CAUTION: DO NOT add bleach or acidic solutions directly to the sample-preparation waste.","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"5b7dr","text":"Buffer AL and Buffer AW1 contain guanidine hydrochloride, which can form highly reactive compounds when combined with bleach. steps: Nucleic acids were extracted from the filters using the Qiagen DNeasy Blood and Tissue Kit with some modifications to the manufacturer’s protocol.
Prior to extraction, 0.5 mm and 0.1 mm glass beads (BioSpec Products) transferred to glass beaker, covered with tin foil, and ashed at 500 °C for 5 hours.
0.75 g of each bead size was distributed into sterile 5 ml extraction tubes, the tubes with caps loosened were subsequently autoclaved and UV treated for 30 min.
To serve as a control in each set of extractions, an additional empty tube with beads was carried through the process as an extraction blank.

Ashed beads were added to sample filters tubes with subsequent bead beating steps as in Djurhuus et al., 2017, and then incubated at 56 °C overnight with 900 μl Buffer ATL and 100 μl Proteinase K (Qiagen).
Bead free supernatant was transferred to 2 ml tube, 650 μl Buffer AL was added, and then briefly vortexed. An additional 650 μl Ethanol (96-100%, molecular grade) was added, then vortexed briefly.
Mixture was added into mini spin column (650 μl, 3x). Remaining steps followed the manufacturer’s protocol for the DNeasy Blood and Tissue Kit.
Samples were subsequently diluted 1:10 for 12S rRNA gene amplicon and metabarcoding preparation.
creator: Collin Closek
